title: Preparation of TRIS Buffer Solution
author: Katy M Monteith
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.p2vdqe6

steps.title: Add 121
steps.instruction: Add 121.14g of TRIS base to 800 mL of triple distilled H₂O

steps.title: Stir solution on magnetic plate using...
steps.instruction: Stir solution on magnetic plate using magnetic flea until TRIS base completely dissolved

steps.title: Using a pH meter, adjust pH...
steps.instruction: Using a pH meter, adjust pH of solution to pH 8.0 by adding concentrated hydrochloric acid (HCl)

steps.title: Add triple distilled H₂O to bring...
steps.instruction: Add triple distilled H₂O to bring final volume of solution to 1 L
